code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let s = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = string.byte_at(s, i)
    match b
    when Some(v)
      if v == 10
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if n > 0
    let last = string.byte_at(s, n - 1)
    match last
    when Some(v)
      if v != 10
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  print("lines=#{count}")
end
